executor: ExecutorSpec!\n  \"\"\"How to interpret the result\"\"\"\n  result: ResultSpec\n  \"\"\"Evaluation criteria and thresholds\"\"\"\n  evaluation: Evaluation\n  \"\"\"Whether the definition is currently active\"\"\"\n  active: Boolean!\n  \"\"\"Whether the definition must pass for merge\"\"\"\n  required: Boolean\n  \"\"\"Whether this definition was discovered from the docgraph\"\"\"\n  graphSource: Boolean\n  \"\"\"When the definition was created\"\"\"\n  createdAt: DateTime!\n}\n\n\"\"\"ExecutionDefinitionEdge is one edge in an ExecutionDefinitionConnection\"\"\"\ntype ExecutionDefinitionEdge {\n  \"\"\"The definition at this position\"\"\"\n  node: ExecutionDefinition!\n  \"\"\"Opaque cursor for pagination\"\"\"\n  cursor: String!\n}\n\n\"\"\"ExecutionDefinitionConnection is a Relay cursor connection of execution definitions\"\"\"\ntype ExecutionDefinitionConnection {\n  \"\"\"Ordered list of definition edges\"\"\"\n  edges: [ExecutionDefinitionEdge!]!\n  \"\"\"Pagination metadata\"\"\"\n  pageInfo: PageInfo!\n  \"\"\"Total number of definitions matching the filter\"\"\"\n  totalCount: Int!\n}\n\n\"\"\"ExecutionRun represents one invocation of an execution definition\"\"\"\ntype ExecutionRun implements Node {\n  \"\"\"Unique run identifier\"\"\"\n  id: ID!\n  \"\"\"ID of the definition that was executed\"\"\"\n  definitionId: String!\n  \"\"\"IDs of artifacts involved in this run\"\"\"\n  artifactIds: [String!]!\n  \"\"\"When the run started\"\"\"\n  startedAt: DateTime!\n  \"\"\"When the run finished\"\"\"\n  finishedAt: DateTime!\n  \"\"\"Run outcome status (e.g. \"pass\", \"fail\", \"error\")\"\"\"\n  status: String!\n  \"\"\"Process exit code\"\"\"\n  exitCode: Int!\n  \"\"\"Whether a failure blocks merge\"\"\"\n  mergeBlocking: Boolean\n  \"\"\"Correlated agent session ID (null if not agent-driven)\"\"\"\n  agentSessionId: String\n  \"\"\"Opaque attachments (files, screenshots, etc.)\"\"\"\n  attachments: JSON\n  \"\"\"Host and version metadata for reproducibility\"\"\"\n  provenance: Provenance\n  \"\"\"Metric observation extracted from output (null if not metric-typed)\"\"\"\n  metric: MetricObservation\n  \"\"\"Captured stdout from the execution\"\"\"\n  stdout: String\n  \"\"\"Captured stderr from the execution\"\"\"\n  stderr: String\n  \"\"\"Extracted numeric value (null if not parsed)\"\"\"\n  value: Float\n  \"\"\"Unit of the extracted value\"\"\"\n  unit: String\n  \"\"\"Whether the output was successfully parsed\"\"\"\n  parsed: Boolean\n}\n\n\"\"\"ExecutionRunEdge is one edge in an ExecutionRunConnection\"\"\"\ntype ExecutionRunEdge {\n  \"\"\"The run at this position\"\"\"\n  node: ExecutionRun!\n  \"\"\"Opaque cursor for pagination\"\"\"\n  cursor: String!\n}\n\n\"\"\"ExecutionRunConnection is a Relay cursor connection of execution runs\"\"\"\ntype ExecutionRunConnection {\n  \"\"\"Ordered list of run edges\"\"\"\n  edges: [ExecutionRunEdge!]!\n  \"\"\"Pagination metadata\"\"\"\n  pageInfo: PageInfo!\n  \"\"\"Total number of runs matching the filter\"\"\"\n  totalCount: Int!\n}\n\n\"\"\"ExecutionRunLog holds the captured output from an execution run\"\"\"\ntype ExecutionRunLog {\n  \"\"\"Captured standard output\"\"\"\n  stdout: String!\n  \"\"\"Captured standard error\"\"\"\n  stderr: String!\n}\n\n\"\"\"Provenance captures host and version metadata for reproducibility\"\"\"\ntype Provenance {\n  \"\"\"Actor that triggered the execution (agent name or \"human\")\"\"\"\n  actor: String\n  \"\"\"Hostname where the execution ran\"\"\"\n  host: String\n  \"\"\"Git revision at execution time\"\"\"\n  gitRev: String\n  \"\"\"DDx binary version\"\"\"\n  ddxVersion: String\n}\n\n\"\"\"MetricObservation records a metric-shaped measurement from an execution\"\"\"\ntype MetricObservation {\n  \"\"\"Artifact ID the metric belongs to\"\"\"\n  artifactId: String!\n  \"\"\"Definition ID that produced this metric\"\"\"\n  definitionId: String!\n  \"\"\"When the observation was recorded\"\"\"\n  observedAt: DateTime!\n  \"\"\"Observation status (e.g. \"pass\", \"warn\", \"fail\")\"\"\"\n  status: String!\n  \"\"\"Observed numeric value\"\"\"\n  value: Float!\n  \"\"\"Unit of measurement\"\"\"\n  unit: String\n  \"\"\"Raw sample values (for distribution metrics)\"\"\"\n  samples: [Float!]\n  \"\"\"Comparison against baseline (null if no baseline)\"\"\"\n  comparison: ComparisonResult\n}\n\n\"\"\"ComparisonResult records a metric comparison against a baseline\"\"\"\ntype ComparisonResult {\n  \"\"\"Baseline value being compared against\"\"\"\n  baseline: Float!\n  \"\"\"Absolute difference (observed - baseline)\"\"\"\n  delta: Float!\n  \"\"\"Direction of change (\"better\", \"worse\", \"neutral\")\"\"\"\n  direction: String!\n}\n\n# ============================================\n# Coordinators\n# ============================================\n\n\"\"\"LandOutcomeSummary is one entry in the coordinator's submission log\"\"\"\ntype LandOutcomeSummary {\n  \"\"\"When the submission completed\"\"\"\n  ts: DateTime!\n  \"\"\"Bead ID that was submitted (null for non-bead work)\"\"\"\n  beadId: String\n  \"\"\"Attempt ID of the submission\"\"\"\n  attemptId: String\n  \"\"\"Outcome: landed, preserved, failed, or push_failed\"\"\"\n  outcome: String!\n  \"\"\"Duration of the land operation in milliseconds\"\"\"\n  durationMs: Int!\n  \"\"\"Number of commits in the submission\"\"\"\n  commitCount: Int!\n}\n\n\"\"\"CoordinatorMetrics holds outcome metrics for one land coordinator\"\"\"\ntype CoordinatorMetrics {\n  \"\"\"Number of submissions successfully merged\"\"\"\n  landed: Int!\n  \"\"\"Number of submissions kept in a separate worktree\"\"\"\n  preserved: Int!\n  \"\"\"Number of submissions that failed\"\"\"\n  failed: Int!\n  \"\"\"Number of submissions that failed to push\"\"\"\n  pushFailed: Int!\n  \"\"\"Sum of all submission durations in milliseconds\"\"\"\n  totalDurationMs: Int!\n  \"\"\"Total commits across all submissions\"\"\"\n  totalCommits: Int!\n  \"\"\"Ratio of preserved+failed to total submissions\"\"\"\n  preservedRatio: Float!\n  \"\"\"Up to the last 10 submission outcomes\"\"\"\n  lastSubmissions: [LandOutcomeSummary!]\n}\n\n\"\"\"CoordinatorMetricsEntry pairs a project root with its coordinator metrics\"\"\"\ntype CoordinatorMetricsEntry {\n  \"\"\"Absolute path to the project root\"\"\"\n  projectRoot: String!\n  \"\"\"Coordinator outcome metrics for this project\"\"\"\n  metrics: CoordinatorMetrics!\n}\n\n# ============================================\n# Health\n# ============================================\n\n\"\"\"HealthStatus represents the server health response\"\"\"\ntype HealthStatus {\n  \"\"\"Status string (\"ok\" when healthy)\"\"\"\n  status: String!\n  \"\"\"When the server process started\"\"\"\n  startedAt: DateTime!\n}\n\n\"\"\"ReadyCheck represents one subsystem readiness check\"\"\"\ntype ReadyCheck {\n  \"\"\"Subsystem name being checked\"\"\"\n  name: String!\n  \"\"\"Check result (\"ok\" or a short problem description)\"\"\"\n  status: String!\n}\n\n\"\"\"ReadyStatus represents the server readiness response\"\"\"\ntype ReadyStatus {\n  \"\"\"True when all subsystem checks pass\"\"\"\n  ready: Boolean!\n  \"\"\"Per-subsystem readiness state\"\"\"\n  checks: [ReadyCheck!]!\n}\n\n# ============================================\n# Process Metrics\n# ============================================\n\n\"\"\"Window captures the time window used to scope a metrics query\"\"\"\ntype Window {\n  \"\"\"Cutoff time for the window (null means all-time)\"\"\"\n  since: DateTime\n}\n\n\"\"\"SourceRef explains where a derived metric fact originated\"\"\"\ntype SourceRef {\n  \"\"\"Bead ID associated with this fact\"\"\"\n  beadId: String\n  \"\"\"Agent session ID associated with this fact\"\"\"\n  sessionId: String\n  \"\"\"Native (harness-specific) session identifier\"\"\"\n  nativeSessionId: String\n  \"\"\"Native log reference for traceability\"\"\"\n  nativeLogRef: String\n  \"\"\"SHA of the commit that closed the bead\"\"\"\n  closingCommitSha: String\n  \"\"\"Timestamp of the source event\"\"\"\n  timestamp: DateTime\n  \"\"\"Source system identifier\"\"\"\n  source: String\n}\n\n\"\"\"AggregateSummaryBeads holds bead-level aggregate counts\"\"\"\ntype AggregateSummaryBeads {\n  \"\"\"Total number of beads\"\"\"\n  total: Int!\n  \"\"\"Number of beads in open status\"\"\"\n  open: Int!\n  \"\"\"Number of beads currently in progress\"\"\"\n  inProgress: Int!\n  \"\"\"Number of closed beads\"\"\"\n  closed: Int!\n  \"\"\"Number of beads that have been reopened\"\"\"\n  reopened: Int!\n  \"\"\"Beads with known cycle time data\"\"\"\n  knownCycleTime: Int!\n  \"\"\"Beads with unknown cycle time data\"\"\"\n  unknownCycleTime: Int!\n  \"\"\"Beads with known cost data\"\"\"\n  knownCost: Int!\n  \"\"\"Beads with estimated cost data\"\"\"\n  estimatedCost: Int!\n  \"\"\"Beads with unknown cost data\"\"\"\n  unknownCost: Int!\n}\n\n\"\"\"AggregateSummarySessions holds session-level aggregate counts\"\"\"\ntype AggregateSummarySessions {\n  \"\"\"Total number of sessions\"\"\"\n  total: Int!\n  \"\"\"Sessions correlated to a bead\"\"\"\n  correlated: Int!\n  \"\"\"Sessions not correlated to any bead\"\"\"\n  uncorrelated: Int!\n  \"\"\"Total prompt/input tokens consumed\"\"\"\n  inputTokens: Int!\n  \"\"\"Total completion/output tokens generated\"\"\"\n  outputTokens: Int!\n  \"\"\"Total tokens (input + output)\"\"\"\n  totalTokens: Int!\n  \"\"\"Sessions with known cost data\"\"\"\n  knownCost: Int!\n  \"\"\"Sessions with estimated cost data\"\"\"\n  estimatedCost: Int!\n  \"\"\"Sessions with unknown cost data\"\"\"\n  unknownCost: Int!\n  \"\"\"Total cost in USD\"\"\"\n  costUsd: Float!\n}\n\n\"\"\"AggregateSummaryCost holds cost aggregates across beads and features\"\"\"\ntype AggregateSummaryCost {\n  \"\"\"Number of beads with cost data\"\"\"\n  beads: Int!\n  \"\"\"Number of features with cost data\"\"\"\n  features: Int!\n  \"\"\"Total known cost in USD\"\"\"\n  knownCostUsd: Float!\n  \"\"\"Total estimated cost in USD\"\"\"\n  estimatedCostUsd: Float!\n  \"\"\"Number of beads with no cost data\"\"\"\n  unknownBeads: Int!\n}\n\n\"\"\"AggregateSummaryCycleTime holds cycle time aggregates\"\"\"\ntype AggregateSummaryCycleTime {\n  \"\"\"Number of beads with known cycle time\"\"\"\n  knownCount: Int!\n  \"\"\"Number of beads with unknown cycle time\"\"\"\n  unknownCount: Int!\n  \"\"\"Average cycle time in milliseconds\"\"\"\n  averageMs: Int\n  \"\"\"Minimum cycle time in milliseconds\"\"\"\n  minMs: Int\n  \"\"\"Maximum cycle time in milliseconds\"\"\"\n  maxMs: Int\n}\n\n\"\"\"AggregateSummaryRework holds rework/churn aggregates\"\"\"\ntype AggregateSummaryRework {\n  \"\"\"Number of beads with known closure data\"\"\"\n  knownClosed: Int!\n  \"\"\"Number of beads known to have been reopened\"\"\"\n  knownReopened: Int!\n  \"\"\"Number of beads with unknown rework data\"\"\"\n  unknownCount: Int!\n  \"\"\"Ratio of reopened to total closed beads\"\"\"\n  reopenRate: Float!\n  \"\"\"Total number of post-close revisions\"\"\"\n  revisionCount: Int!\n}\n\n\"\"\"AggregateSummary is the full process-metrics summary\"\"\"\ntype AggregateSummary {\n  \"\"\"Bead-level aggregate counts\"\"\"\n  beads: AggregateSummaryBeads!\n  \"\"\"Session-level aggregate counts\"\"\"\n  sessions: AggregateSummarySessions!\n  \"\"\"Cost aggregates\"\"\"\n  cost: AggregateSummaryCost!\n  \"\"\"Cycle time aggregates\"\"\"\n  cycleTime: AggregateSummaryCycleTime!\n  \"\"\"Rework aggregates\"\"\"\n  rework: AggregateSummaryRework!\n}\n\n\"\"\"CostSummary aggregates cost across all beads/features in a cost report\"\"\"\ntype CostSummary {\n  \"\"\"Number of beads with cost data\"\"\"\n  beads: Int!\n  \"\"\"Number of features with cost data\"\"\"\n  features: Int!\n  \"\"\"Total known cost in USD\"\"\"\n  knownCostUsd: Float!\n  \"\"\"Total estimated cost in USD\"\"\"\n  estimatedCostUsd: Float!\n  \"\"\"Number of beads with no cost data\"\"\"\n  unknownBeads: Int!\n}\n\n\"\"\"BeadCostRow is one bead's cost attribution within a CostReport\"\"\"\ntype BeadCostRow {\n  \"\"\"Bead identifier\"\"\"\n  beadId: String!\n  \"\"\"Bead title\"\"\"\n  title: String!\n  \"\"\"Spec/feature ID the bead belongs to\"\"\"\n  specId: String\n  \"\"\"Current bead status\"\"\"\n  status: String!\n  \"\"\"Agent sessions contributing to this bead's cost\"\"\"\n  sessionIds: [String!]\n  \"\"\"Total prompt/input tokens consumed\"\"\"\n  inputTokens: Int!\n  \"\"\"Total completion/output tokens generated\"\"\"\n  outputTokens: Int!\n  \"\"\"Total tokens (input + output)\"\"\"\n  totalTokens: Int!\n  \"\"\"Cost data quality: known, estimated, or unknown\"\"\"\n  costState: String!\n  \"\"\"Cost in USD (null if unknown)\"\"\"\n  costUsd: Float\n  \"\"\"Number of sessions with unknown cost\"\"\"\n  unknownSessions: Int\n  \"\"\"Source references for cost attribution\"\"\"\n  provenance: [SourceRef!]\n}\n\n\"\"\"FeatureCostRow aggregates bead cost rows by spec/feature ID\"\"\"\ntype FeatureCostRow {\n  \"\"\"Spec/feature identifier\"\"\"\n  specId: String!\n  \"\"\"Bead IDs contributing to this feature's cost\"\"\"\n  beadIds: [String!]\n  \"\"\"Total prompt/input tokens consumed\"\"\"\n  inputTokens: Int!\n  \"\"\"Total completion/output tokens generated\"\"\"\n  outputTokens: Int!\n  \"\"\"Total tokens (input + output)\"\"\"\n  totalTokens: Int!\n  \"\"\"Cost data quality: known, estimated, or unknown\"\"\"\n  costState: String!\n  \"\"\"Cost in USD (null if unknown)\"\"\"\n  costUsd: Float\n  \"\"\"Number of beads with unknown cost\"\"\"\n  unknownBeads: Int\n}\n\n\"\"\"CostReport describes bead and feature cost attribution over a time window\"\"\"\ntype CostReport {\n  \"\"\"Report scope (e.g. \"all\", \"bead\", \"feature\")\"\"\"\n  scope: String!\n  \"\"\"Time window for the report (null means all-time)\"\"\"\n  window: Window\n  \"\"\"Filter: specific bead ID (null for all beads)\"\"\"\n  beadId: String\n  \"\"\"Filter: specific feature ID (null for all features)\"\"\"\n  featureId: String\n  \"\"\"Per-bead cost rows\"\"\"\n  beads: [BeadCostRow!]\n  \"\"\"Per-feature cost rows\"\"\"\n  features: [FeatureCostRow!]\n  \"\"\"Aggregate cost summary\"\"\"\n  summary: CostSummary!\n}\n\n\"\"\"CycleTimeSummary aggregates lifecycle timing across all beads in a report\"\"\"\ntype CycleTimeSummary {\n  \"\"\"Number of beads with known cycle time\"\"\"\n  knownCount: Int!\n  \"\"\"Number of beads with unknown cycle time\"\"\"\n  unknownCount: Int!\n  \"\"\"Average cycle time in milliseconds\"\"\"\n  averageMs: Int\n  \"\"\"Minimum cycle time in milliseconds\"\"\"\n  minMs: Int\n  \"\"\"Maximum cycle time in milliseconds\"\"\"\n  maxMs: Int\n}\n\n\"\"\"CycleTimeRow describes one bead's lifecycle timing\"\"\"\ntype CycleTimeRow {\n  \"\"\"Bead identifier\"\"\"\n  beadId: String!\n  \"\"\"Bead title\"\"\"\n  title: String!\n  \"\"\"Spec/feature ID the bead belongs to\"\"\"\n  specId: String\n  \"\"\"Current bead status\"\"\"\n  status: String!\n  \"\"\"When the bead was created\"\"\"\n  createdAt: DateTime!\n  \"\"\"When the bead was first closed\"\"\"\n  firstClosedAt: DateTime\n  \"\"\"When the bead was last closed\"\"\"\n  lastClosedAt: DateTime\n  \"\"\"Total cycle time in milliseconds (null if still open)\"\"\"\n  cycleTimeMs: Int\n  \"\"\"Number of times the bead was reopened\"\"\"\n  reopenCount: Int\n  \"\"\"Number of post-close revisions\"\"\"\n  revisionCount: Int\n  \"\"\"Time spent in open status in milliseconds\"\"\"\n  timeInOpenMs: Int\n  \"\"\"Time spent in in-progress status in milliseconds\"\"\"\n  timeInProgressMs: Int\n  \"\"\"Time spent in closed status in milliseconds\"\"\"\n  timeInClosedMs: Int\n  \"\"\"Cycle time data quality: known, estimated, or unknown\"\"\"\n  cycleState: String!\n  \"\"\"Source references for timing attribution\"\"\"\n  provenance: [SourceRef!]\n}\n\n\"\"\"CycleTimeReport describes lifecycle timing over a time window\"\"\"\ntype CycleTimeReport {\n  \"\"\"Report scope\"\"\"\n  scope: String!\n  \"\"\"Time window for the report\"\"\"\n  window: Window\n  \"\"\"Per-bead cycle time rows\"\"\"\n  beads: [CycleTimeRow!]\n  \"\"\"Aggregate cycle time summary\"\"\"\n  summary: CycleTimeSummary!\n}\n\n\"\"\"ReworkSummary aggregates reopen and post-close churn\"\"\"\ntype ReworkSummary {\n  \"\"\"Number of beads with known closure data\"\"\"\n  knownClosed: Int!\n  \"\"\"Number of beads known to have been reopened\"\"\"\n  knownReopened: Int!\n  \"\"\"Number of beads with unknown rework data\"\"\"\n  unknownCount: Int!\n  \"\"\"Ratio of reopened to total closed beads\"\"\"\n  reopenRate: Float!\n  \"\"\"Total number of post-close revisions\"\"\"\n  revisionCount: Int!\n}\n\n\"\"\"ReworkRow describes reopen and revision facts for one bead\"\"\"\ntype ReworkRow {\n  \"\"\"Bead identifier\"\"\"\n  beadId: String!\n  \"\"\"Bead title\"\"\"\n  title: String!\n  \"\"\"Spec/feature ID the bead belongs to\"\"\"\n  specId: String\n  \"\"\"Current bead status\"\"\"\n  status: String!\n  \"\"\"When the bead was first closed\"\"\"\n  firstClosedAt: DateTime\n  \"\"\"Whether the bead has been reopened at least once\"\"\"\n  reopened: Boolean!\n  \"\"\"Number of times the bead was reopened\"\"\"\n  reopenCount: Int\n  \"\"\"Number of post-close revisions\"\"\"\n  revisionCount: Int\n  \"\"\"Rework data quality: known, estimated, or unknown\"\"\"\n  reworkState: String!\n  \"\"\"Source references for rework attribution\"\"\"\n  provenance: [SourceRef!]\n}\n\n\"\"\"ReworkReport describes reopen and post-close churn over a time window\"\"\"\ntype ReworkReport {\n  \"\"\"Report scope\"\"\"\n  scope: String!\n  \"\"\"Time window for the report\"\"\"\n  window: Window\n  \"\"\"Per-bead rework rows\"\"\"\n  beads: [ReworkRow!]\n  \"\"\"Aggregate rework summary\"\"\"\n  summary: ReworkSummary!\n}\n\n# ============================================\n# Providers\n# ============================================\n\n\"\"\"Provider represents an agent provider/harness configuration\"\"\"\ntype Provider implements Node {\n  \"\"\"Unique provider identifier\"\"\"\n  id: ID!\n  \"\"\"Display name\"\"\"\n  name: String!\n  \"\"\"Provider kind (e.g. \"cli\", \"api\")\"\"\"\n  kind: String!\n  \"\"\"Default model for this provider\"\"\"\n  defaultModel: String\n  \"\"\"Available model identifiers\"\"\"\n  models: [String!]\n  \"\"\"Default effort level\"\"\"\n  defaultEffort: String\n  \"\"\"Available effort levels\"\"\"\n  effortLevels: [String!]\n  \"\"\"Default execution timeout in milliseconds\"\"\"\n  timeoutMs: Int\n  \"\"\"Granted permission scopes\"\"\"\n  permissions: [String!]\n}\n\n# ============================================\n# Query Root\n# ============================================\n\n\"\"\"Query is the root entry point for all read operations\"\"\"\ntype Query {\n  \"\"\"Fetch any entity by its globally unique ID (Relay node interface)\"\"\"\n  node(id: ID!): Node\n\n  # ==========================================\n  # Node \u0026 Project Queries\n  # ==========================================\n\n  \"\"\"Return the server node information (maps to GET /api/node)\"\"\"\n  nodeInfo: NodeInfo!\n\n  \"\"\"List all registered projects with cursor pagination (maps to GET /api/projects)\"\"\"\n  projects(\n    \"\"\"Return the first N edges after the cursor\"\"\"\n    first: Int,\n    \"\"\"Cursor to start after\"\"\"\n    after: String,\n    \"\"\"Return the last N edges before the cursor\"\"\"\n    last: Int,\n    \"\"\"Cursor to end before\"\"\"\n    before: String,\n    \"\"\"Include projects whose path is unreachable\"\"\"\n    includeUnreachable: Boolean\n  ): ProjectConnection!\n\n  # ==========================================\n  # Bead Queries\n  # ==========================================\n\n  \"\"\"List all beads with cursor pagination and optional filters (maps to GET /api/beads)\"\"\"\n  beads(\n    \"\"\"Return the first N edges after the cursor\"\"\"\n    first: Int,\n    \"\"\"Cursor to start after\"\"\"\n    after: String,\n    \"\"\"Return the last N edges before the cursor\"\"\"\n    last: Int,\n    \"\"\"Cursor to end before\"\"\"\n    before: String,\n    \"\"\"Filter by lifecycle status\"\"\"\n    status: String,\n    \"\"\"Filter by label\"\"\"\n    label: String,\n    \"\"\"Filter by project ID\"\"\"\n    projectID: String\n  ): BeadConnection!\n\n  \"\"\"List beads for a specific project (maps to GET /api/beads with project filter)\"\"\"\n  beadsByProject(\n    \"\"\"Project identifier to filter by\"\"\"\n    projectID: String!,\n    \"\"\"Return the first N edges after the cursor\"\"\"\n    first: Int,\n    \"\"\"Cursor to start after\"\"\"\n    after: String,\n    \"\"\"Return the last N edges before the cursor\"\"\"\n    last: Int,\n    \"\"\"Cursor to end before\"\"\"\n    before: String,\n    \"\"\"Filter by lifecycle status\"\"\"\n    status: String,\n    \"\"\"Filter by label\"\"\"\n    label: String\n  ): BeadConnection!\n\n  \"\"\"List open beads whose dependencies are all closed (maps to GET /api/beads/ready)\"\"\"\n  beadsReady(\n    \"\"\"Return the first N edges after the cursor\"\"\"\n    first: Int,\n    \"\"\"Cursor to start after\"\"\"\n    after: String,\n    \"\"\"Return the last N edges before the cursor\"\"\"\n    last: Int,\n    \"\"\"Cursor to end before\"\"\"\n    before: String\n  ): BeadConnection!\n\n  \"\"\"List open beads with unclosed dependencies (maps to GET /api/beads/blocked)\"\"\"\n  beadsBlocked(\n    \"\"\"Return the first N edges after the cursor\"\"\"\n    first: Int,\n    \"\"\"Cursor to start after\"\"\"\n    after: String,\n    \"\"\"Return the last N edges before the cursor\"\"\"\n    last: Int,\n    \"\"\"Cursor to end before\"\"\"\n    before: String\n  ): BeadConnection!\n\n  \"\"\"Return aggregate bead counts by status (maps to GET /api/beads/status)\"\"\"\n  beadsStatus: BeadStatusCounts!\n\n  \"\"\"Return the dependency tree for a bead as a formatted string (maps to GET /api/beads/dep/tree/{id})\"\"\"\n  beadDepTree(\n    \"\"\"Bead ID to compute the dependency tree for\"\"\"\n    beadID: ID!\n  ): String!\n\n  \"\"\"Fetch a single bead by ID (maps to GET /api/beads/{id})\"\"\"\n  bead(\n    \"\"\"Bead identifier\"\"\"\n    id: ID!\n  ): Bead\n\n  # ==========================================\n  # Document Queries\n  # ==========================================\n\n  \"\"\"List all library documents with cursor pagination (maps to GET /api/documents)\"\"\"\n  documents(\n    \"\"\"Return the first N edges after the cursor\"\"\"\n    first: Int,\n    \"\"\"Cursor to start after\"\"\"\n    after: String,\n    \"\"\"Return the last N edges before the cursor\"\"\"\n    last: Int,\n    \"\"\"Cursor to end before\"\"\"\n    before: String,\n    \"\"\"Filter by document type (e.g. \"prompt\", \"template\")\"\"\"\n    type: String\n  ): DocumentConnection!\n\n  \"\"\"Read a single document by path (maps to GET /api/documents/{path...})\"\"\"\n  documentByPath(\n    \"\"\"Document path relative to the library root\"\"\"\n    path: String!\n  ): Document\n\n  \"\"\"Return the full document dependency graph (maps to GET /api/docs/graph)\"\"\"\n  docGraph: DocGraph!\n\n  \"\"\"Return documents that are stale (maps to GET /api/docs/stale)\"\"\"\n  docStale: [StaleReason!]!\n\n  \"\"\"Return the dependency IDs of a document (maps to GET /api/docs/{id}/deps)\"\"\"\n  docDeps(\n    \"\"\"Document identifier\"\"\"\n    documentID: ID!\n  ): [String!]!\n\n  \"\"\"Return the dependent IDs of a document (maps to GET /api/docs/{id}/dependents)\"\"\"\n  docDependents(\n    \"\"\"Document identifier\"\"\"\n    documentID: ID!\n  ): [String!]!\n\n  \"\"\"Return the git history for a document with cursor pagination (maps to GET /api/docs/{id}/history)\"\"\"\n  docHistory(\n    \"\"\"Document identifier\"\"\"\n    documentID: ID!,\n    \"\"\"Return the first N edges after the cursor\"\"\"\n    first: Int,\n    \"\"\"Cursor to start after\"\"\"\n    after: String,\n    \"\"\"Return the last N edges before the cursor\"\"\"\n    last: Int,\n    \"\"\"Cursor to end before\"\"\"\n    before: String\n  ): CommitConnection!\n\n  \"\"\"Return the diff for a document (maps to GET /api/docs/{id}/diff)\"\"\"\n  docDiff(\n    \"\"\"Document identifier\"\"\"\n    documentID: ID!,\n    \"\"\"Git ref to diff against (default: HEAD)\"\"\"\n    ref: String\n  ): String!\n\n  \"\"\"Fetch a single document by ID (maps to GET /api/docs/{id})\"\"\"\n  doc(\n    \"\"\"Document identifier\"\"\"\n    id: ID!\n  ): Document\n\n  \"\"\"Search library documents (maps data.text: I’ve confirmed there’s a lot of historical DDx material in this tree, so I’m narrowing to the active CLI code and the tracker-related paths that this bead might touch. Next I’m checking the current working tree and the exact decomposition/dependency implementation points before making any edits.

input.command: /bin/zsh -lc "git status --short && printf '\\nTOP\\n' && ls -1 && printf '\\nCLI\\n' && ls -1 cli | sed -n '1,40p' && printf '\\nDDX\\n' && ls -1 .ddx | sed -n '1,40p'"

data.text: I found an existing `parent_ancestor_in_deps` doctor path plus decomposer/intake tests that mention the parent back-edge. I’m reading those specific implementations now to verify whether the regression is already covered or whether there’s still a missing edge in the programmatic decomposition path.

input.command: /bin/zsh -lc "sed -n '1,240p' cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_intake_decompose_test.go && printf '\\n---DOCTOR---\\n' && sed -n '1,260p' cli/internal/bead/doctor.go && printf '\\n---RECOVERY---\\n' && sed -n '1,260p' cli/internal/agent/recovery_decompose.go && printf '\\n---LOOP---\\n' && sed -n '430,620p' cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_loop.go"
